feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Secret succession
entry.summary:
Author: OLKOLO

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 498Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Lady Caroline Collingwood adopts a neglected American toddler named Evan Buckley during a trip to the United States and brings him back to England, renaming him Oliver Roy and raising him within the powerful Roy family from Succession. Growing up surrounded by wealth and ruthless family politics under Logan Roy, Oliver becomes intelligent, observant, and strategically brilliant. At 26, after conflicts and power struggles within the Roy family, Oliver leaves and moves to Los Angeles. There he hides his identity by returning to his birth name, Evan Buckley, and builds a new life as a firefighter in the world of 9-1-1. He lives quietly until his true identity as a member of the Roy dynasty is eventually discovered, bringing his two very different worlds—powerful media empire and everyday heroism—into collision.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Masks and Kisses
entry.summary:
Author: buckleyydiazz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,390Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “You look… tired-tired,” Buck said, voice low and gentle, like he didn’t want to startle Eddie’s nerves.Eddie huffed something that might’ve been a laugh. “Thank you for the clinical assessment, Evan.”Buck’s thumbs traced slow, grounding circles against Eddie’s hips through his shirt. “Better?”“Yeah,” Eddie admitted, voice rougher than he wanted. “A little.”Buck leaned in and kissed him—soft, unhurried, a slow press that didn’t demand anything except that Eddie be here for it. Eddie kissed back immediately, because he could never not. Because Buck’s mouth always felt like permission to come home to himself.When they pulled apart, Buck kept his forehead close, breathing the same air. “Shower?” Buck suggested.Eddie’s shoulders dropped another inch. “Please.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: the 98th act
entry.summary:
Author: kingofprocrastination

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,152Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 56

Summary: Years later, Eddie would wonder exactly what the first sign was. If it was the cough or the fatigue. If it was the way that Buck always seemed to be just a little short of breath, or got dizzier than usual when standing up. He wondered if he had recognized the signs then, could he have changed things? Stopped the ticking of the clock, the slipping of the grains of sand into the bottom of the hourglass? Years later, he would realize that once the symptoms started to show, it was likely already too late. But that wasn’t what he had been paying attention to. No, Eddie had been focused on what had been simultaneously the easiest and (second) hardest thing he’d ever done: realizing he was in love with Evan Buckley.Or, how Eddie realizes that Buck is hiding a secret from the 118—one that could fundamentally change everything forever. This is a story about hope and grief, about coming to terms with oneself and learning to accept love. This is a story about love, loss, and all the messy things in between.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: Eddie Diaz has been scared of a lot of things in his life
entry.summary:
Author: Braindead_alice

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,855Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: Eddie has been scared of many things in his life. He’s been in the army, he’s loved and lost, he’s had his son disappear, his friends get injured.  None of it has ever scared him as much as his feelings for Evan Buckley.

entry.title: The Thing About It
entry.summary:
Author: jupitcrs

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,233Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: Apparently everyone in New Mexico has a better gaydar than the rest of the continental United States combined, because Eddie's not sure so many people have ever clocked him in such a brief span of time ever. Let alone so cruelly. There's a lot of things about himself that Eddie's sort of always known, but kept pushed away in a faraway corner of his mind. Somewhere safe, where it's out of reach. He could live a life entire pretending it isn't there, and if it rots away inside of him until it's ugly and broken, well. Even more reason to never look. Unfortunately. His best friend in the whole world keeps making him look.or: Buck and Eddie stop at a motel halfway through their ride back home. Eddie thinks a lot. Then he says a lot, too.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: grnchickenpox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,664Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 13

Summary: Evan ‘Buck’ Buckley, owns the bookstore Fahrenheit 118. He meets so many walks of life who come and go from his bookstore, but the day he meets a soldier named Eddie Diaz he embarks on a journey to tell the greatest story of all, a love story.*Eddie Diaz, a single father to ten-year-old Christopher, meets bookstore owner Buck and becomes best friends with him, but that's not where their story ends... or Buck owns a bookstore and Eddie is his new favorite customer.

entry.title: See Me For Me
entry.summary:
Author: Need_lifeline

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,304Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 52

Summary: Eyes darting around each ‘face’ in the parking lot, sweat suddenly sticking uncomfortably to his body, breath quickening, legs speeding up, even though his knee is aching from the sudden random strain, even if it’s begging him to slow down. He doesn’t know what’s going on but he’d rather not stick around and find out. Everything in Buck is telling him to run. Run fast and far and don’t look back.Once Buck reaches his jeep, he immediately gets inside and locks all his doors as if speedrunning a Guinness World Record. Then, he finally takes a deep breath, the eyes are out there, but they can’t reach him from inside. He can finally take a deep, very oxygenated breath—just to have his breath stuck in his throat again. No. Who is that? What is that?Looking back at him in the vanity mirror, staring into him, mocking him…was him, but it wasn’t. Everything was wrong. Buck couldn’t recognize the face in front of him just knows that it’s copying his movements, even the timing in his blinks, trying to be him, but not quite getting it right. OR: During the grocery store fight Buck develops prosopagnosia (face blindness). How will he survive not recognizing anyone and with his family hating him?

entry.title: When The World Stops
entry.summary:
Author: 1hey_ass_butt1

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,969Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 120

Summary: “Eddie, why would you do that? And why did the sheriff think you murdered me? That’s crazy! You have a silver star!” “First off, Athena told me to jump out the window. Second, the sheriff talked to the witnesses at the diner who heard us arguing. And third, the silver star didn’t seem to matter when the sheriff was interrogating me in a hospital bed and stealing my apple sauce.” “He stole your apple sauce? Wait witnesses? You mean the guys who thought we were a couple—which, by the way, is ridiculous—and verbally attacked us?” Buck laughs at the thought and it makes Eddie’s mind freeze. OR: Buck doesn't want to sleep on the road trip back to L.A. and Eddie doesn't want to talk about what happened.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,573Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 87

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: get on your knees, come and get what you prayed for
entry.summary:
Author: brebanana93

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,337Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 75

Summary: Eddie is mid-sip when someone saunters up to the bar beside him. “You looking to adopt a dog? Cause I can bark,” the man says. “Woof.” Eddie laughs and rolls his eyes, immediately recognizing the voice as Buck’s. “Has that line ever worked before?” “Mmm, I don’t know,” Buck answers, leaning onto the bar—and into Eddie’s personal space. “How about you tell me?"   OR.... Eddie and Buck find each other infuriatingly attractive and decide to do something about it.

entry.title: Love Me Anyway
entry.summary:
Author: gryff_grace

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,260Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 214

Summary: Moving slowly, Buck sits up in bed. Groans. Reaches the heel of his hands to press tenderly against his eyes. Inhales, taking in a deep breath. Exhales. Finally, he’s able to open his eyes, and he draws back his hands. Then, he realizes. These are not his hands. Buck stares, flexing out his fingers - not his fingers. They’re long, slender, a little dainty. The index and middle fingers are home to delicate gold rings. The nails are press-ons, colored dark maroon, and what the actual fuck. A sound comes from his mouth - not his mouth - and it’s a sweet, womanly squeak. Oh god oh god oh god. * Or - the fic where Buck is in love with Eddie, wakes up every day in a different body, and has no idea what to do about either.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Author: giveupgetdown

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,557Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 57

entry.title: Confessions (and Other Things Best Not Said in the Vicinity of a Baby Monitor)
entry.summary:
Author: cosmic_echo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,893Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 112

Summary: “—so, yeah, I don’t know what’s wrong with me, Nash,” Buck was saying, frustration threading through his voice. “Every time I see Hen laughing with Eddie, I feel like I’m going to throw up. I haven’t felt like that since—”He broke off abruptly. “You don’t think I’m in love with her, do you?”Chimney stopped dead in his tracks. The baby giggled.“I am,” Buck said with earnest conviction. “I’m in love with Hen.”An impromptu therapy session with Baby Nash leads Buck to a long-overdue breakthrough: he’s in love with Eddie — a revelation he fully intends to take that revelation to the grave. Unfortunately for Buck, Chimney hears every word over the baby monitor. Armed with too much information and minimal impulse control, one by one, Chimney recruits Maddie, Hen, and Ravi into an earnest but ill-considered plan to find out whether Eddie return Buck's feelings. Their investigation stirs up every unresolved crack in Buck and Eddie’s friendship that’s been simmering since Eddie announced his move to El Paso and sets off a chain of misunderstandings that might finally bring them back to each other — if it doesn’t break them apart first.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Drive Home
entry.summary:
Author: kenziebc4289

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,069Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 74

Summary: Post 9x13. Buck and Eddie are driving back to LA and discuss the kidnapping/events of Los Nietos. Neither one of them are quite ready to talk about everything in a deeper way so conversation is stilted and a little awkward. Buck is still feeling guilty about the detour and Eddie doesn't want Buck to leave his sight. Feelings are realized, arguments ensue, and confessions are made.

entry.title: Do Not Go Far From Me
entry.summary:
Author: noLongerhumannn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,599Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 104

Summary: He remembers blue. Bright, electric, passionate blue eyes and a smile that never sinks. He remembers a voice like a melody and a laugh like a burst of wind. He remembers soft hands and curly hair. He remembers a strong body and a warm heart.Buck.Buck is his reason.And for that reason– for Buck, well.Eddie will do whatever the hell it takes.—Or: a peek into Eddie's mind during the events of 9x13

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: back between villages (and everything’s still)
entry.summary:
Author: kikibridges13

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,774Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 239

Summary: “I know this is difficult,” Angela continued. “But there is something else you need to know. The reason I’m calling.” Right, why was he getting a call from Child Protective Services after all? Unless... “Ali had a daughter,” Angela says. “Her name is Charlotte. She’s four.” Four. The number lands like a verdict. Four years. The same amount of time that had passed since he last spoke to Ali. Buck can feel his chest tighten, and he weakly removes his grip from the couch and up to his hand holding the phone. One. Two. Three. “She’s mine,” he whispered faintly. “Yes,” Angela confirmed. “Ali listed you as Charlotte’s biological father.” “I didn’t know,” Buck whispered. “I didn’t know.” *********** Post 6x11 In Another Life. Buck is struggling after the lightning strike, and gets a phone call that flips his world upside down. Or, another girl!Dad Buddie story nobody asked for.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
